summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of enhanced CV React application. All major features working excellently including multilingual support (FR/DE/IT/EN), responsive design, sidebar integration, unified timeline, and interactive elements. Found minor issues with scroll progress bar and navigation on tablet view.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation buttons not clickable on tablet view (768px width)
ui_bugs.details: Navigation elements are present but not visible/clickable on tablet viewport - confirmed issue from previous testing

design_issues.details: Progress bar may be missing or using different selectors

passed_tests: ✅ Geo-restriction bypass for testing - Application accessible
✅ Two-column layout perfect - Sidebar (350px) + Main content (910px)
✅ Sidebar sections complete - All 7 sections present and functional
✅ Stats/Aperçu section - 11+ years experience, 4 companies, 6 diplomas, 3 languages
✅ Language skills with badges - French (C2), English (B2), German (B1)
✅ Technical skills with star ratings - Pack Office, SAP, Management, etc.
✅ Certifications & Permits - Permis B, Chef Circulation, Brewer AFP, Management
✅ Hobbies/Interests with icons - Sport, Travel, Brewing, Reading, Cooking, Technology
✅ Achievements with CountUp animations - 15% train punctuality, 12 people managed, 25+ staff trained, 20% incident reduction
✅ Why Me section - 9+ years experience, versatile, certified specialist, natural leader
✅ Unified Timeline 'Mon Parcours' - Perfect chronological merge of experience and education
✅ Multilingual support complete - All 4 languages (FR/DE/IT/EN) working perfectly
✅ Language switching via flags - Tested German, English, Italian translations
✅ Theme toggle dark/light mode - Working correctly
✅ Mobile responsive (390px) - Sidebar moves to top as required
✅ Desktop responsive (1920px) - Optimal two-column layout
✅ Contact form complete - All fields working with proper translations
✅ Back-to-top button - Visible after scroll and functional
✅ Social share buttons - LinkedIn, Email, WhatsApp present
✅ PDF download button - 'TÉLÉCHARGER MON CV' visible and accessible
✅ Hero section with professional photo and social links
✅ All animations working - CountUp, Framer Motion, scroll animations
✅ Complete translations for all sections in all 4 languages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation visibility/clickability issue on tablet view (768px width). Add scroll progress bar if missing. Both are minor issues - the application is otherwise fully functional and meets all requirements.
